overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City's downtown district. The player character walks along neon-lit pedestrian walkways, crosses a street with light traffic, and approaches the mysterious FF:06:B5 statue in a corporate plaza surrounded by towering glass buildings and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with digital advertising

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway structures

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in same direction along the covered path

entered.detail: overhead concrete and metal structure providing partial cover
tall illuminated advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics
tall modern building with illuminated windows rising in the background
glowing signage with 'NIGHT CITY' text visible on building facade
massive elevated roadway infrastructure with yellow and black trim

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered pedestrian walkway in a cyberpunk downtown district. The player walks forward beneath an elevated highway structure, passing glowing digital billboards and neon signage. The pavement is wet and reflective, suggesting recent rain, while other pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street intersection with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: exits covered walkway and steps onto open street crosswalk
black van drives past from right to left across the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at a yellow-striped crosswalk while observing traffic

notable_agents.action: black van driving through the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: broad yellow painted stripes marking the pedestrian crossing
large illuminated monument with digital display visible in the distance
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk across the street

segments.scene_description: The player exits the covered walkway and enters an open street intersection. They cross the yellow-striped crosswalk as a black van passes by on the right. The FF:06:B5 statue becomes visible in the distance, and the environment opens up to the night sky with palm trees lining the opposite sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk approaching corporate plaza with statue

events.description: steps onto sidewalk on the far side of the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk toward the FF:06:B5 statue while passing other pedestrians

entered.detail: tall white and gray building with vertical architectural lines
concrete and metal bench along the sidewalk edge
rectangular planters with greenery separating walkway from street

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the player walks along a concrete sidewalk toward the FF:06:B5 statue, which grows larger in the frame. The path is lined with modern corporate buildings, benches, and planter boxes. Sparse pedestrian traffic moves in various directions as the plaza entrance approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate plaza with central FF:06:B5 statue monument

events.description: begins circling the statue base and looking upward at the structure
moves closer to examine the statue base details and circuit patterns

agents.ego_description: circling the FF:06:B5 statue, examining it from multiple angles and looking up at the structure

notable_agents.action: person sitting on bench near the statue base

entered.detail: marble-like pedestal with glowing yellow neon trim and circuit patterns
illuminated text display reading 'FF:06:B5' on the statue face
glowing yellow lines embedded in the plaza floor leading to the statue

segments.scene_description: The player enters the plaza and circles the massive FF:06:B5 statue, examining its glowing base and the illuminated text display. The camera looks up at the towering structure against the night sky, then moves closer to inspect the circuit-patterned pavement and neon underglow. A lone NPC sits on a bench in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open corporate plaza with distant buildings

events.description: leaves the statue area and walks deeper into the open plaza

agents.ego_description: walking away from the statue through the open plaza toward the distant buildings

entered.detail: illuminated skyscrapers and structures visible across the open plaza space
purple and pink glowing advertisement signs on distant buildings

segments.scene_description: The player walks away from the FF:06:B5 statue, moving through the open plaza toward the distant city lights. The statue disappears from view behind as the camera focuses on the surrounding corporate architecture and neon-lit buildings across the plaza. The area is quiet with no other pedestrians visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic, neon-lit walkway into a vast, open corporate plaza. It begins beneath an elevated highway on a wet, reflective pedestrian path lined with glowing digital billboards, moving forward alongside other pedestrians. As the camera exits the covered structure, the environment opens up into a street intersection where the player crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk past a passing black van, bringing the distant FF:06:B5 statue into view. The scene then shifts toward a concrete sidewalk flanked by modern corporate buildings and planter boxes before entering the plaza to circle the massive, glowing statue and its circuit-patterned pavement. Finally, the camera turns away from the monument, moving through the quiet, open space toward the distant city lights and towering neon architecture.
